response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the two songs performed by Himemori Luna from on-screen text: 'Otomelody' and 'Sign wa B'.
2. Performed a search for 'Otomelody' by Onegai My Melody and obtained full Japanese and English lyrics.
3. Performed a search for 'Sign wa B' by Oshi no Ko (B-Komachi) and obtained full Japanese and English lyrics.
4. Segmented the video into two song performances and a short transitional bridge.
response.global_summary: A live performance by Vtuber Himemori Luna, consisting of two segments: a cover of "Otomelody" from Onegai My Melody and a cover of "Sign wa B" from Oshi no Ko. There is a short bridge segment between the two songs.

scenes.description: Himemori Luna performs 'Otomelody'. The song title appears in the top-left corner.
